content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (demo_user.txt/demo_password.txt) but notes.txt just says "n/a" with no explanation of how to reach the subscription paywall or blocking/reports features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated functionality like the paywall, app-blocking, and reports screens, especially since a subscription purchase can't be tested live in review. Right now the login works but notes.txt provides zero guidance on navigating past the paywall or triggering StoreKit sandbox purchases. Please replace "n/a" with concrete steps (e.g. "after login, tap Subscribe to see the sandbox purchase flow; use sandbox tester X to unlock features").
